title: epipactis exserta
intro: Epipactis exserta, also known as the longleaf helleborine, is a type of orchid native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Epipactis exserta include treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects.
